# Check out *A Theory of Self-Reproducing Automata* (von Neumann) from UT Austin library while in Austin

You're in Austin 2026-05-06 to 2026-05-10. UT Austin's library has the von Neumann self-reproducing automata book; you flagged wanting to grab it while in town.

Library entry:
https://search.lib.utexas.edu/discovery/fulldisplay?docid=alma991012803389706011&context=L&vid=01UTAU_INST:SEARCH&lang=en&search_scope=MyInst_and_CI&adaptor=Local%20Search%20Engine&tab=Everything&query=any,contains,A%20Theory%20of%20Self-Reproducing%20Automata&mode=simple&offset=0

Check stack location, hours, and whether external borrowers can take it out (vs. read on-site only). If it's read-on-site-only, decide whether a few hours in the library is worth the trip.

## then
Visit UT Austin library; check out (or read on-site) the von Neumann book.
